layout.name: startsAggro
layout.title: Starts Aggressive
layout.tooltip: When checked, this NPC instantly homes in at the specified angle.

layout.name: fixedAngle
layout.title: Fixed Angle
layout.tooltip: When checked, this NPC does not face away from its specified angle when attacking a player.

layout.name: fixedDirection
layout.title: Fixed Direction
layout.tooltip: When checked, this NPC will not flip directions when moving back and forth.

layout.name: angle
layout.title: Attack angle
layout.tooltip: The default angle of attack if no target is found. If Fixed Angle is true, this is also used for the NPC's movement.
